title: 2025-10-24 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 19.07
description: Daily pressure check for 2025-10-24: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 19.07/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-10-24, the score printed 19.07/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and volatility doing most of the work.
